offer: For law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient billing workflows cause cash flow gaps. We centralize client information and document storage instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm billing help
Indie Hackers discussions on legal workflow solutions
DM outreach to law firms with demo video
Community forums for law firms discussing tools
try_it: Let users try client info storage and document management
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Allow CSV import for existing client data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
